title: A2UI Message Schema
description: Describes a JSON payload for an A2UI (Agent to UI) message, which is used to dynamically construct and update user interfaces using zane-ui web components. A message MUST contain exactly ONE of the action properties: 'beginRendering', 'surfaceUpdate', 'dataModelUpdate', or 'deleteSurface'.

beginRendering.description: Signals the client to begin rendering a surface with a root component and specific styles.

surfaceId.description: The unique identifier for the UI surface to be rendered.

root.description: The ID of the root component to render.

styles.description: CSS styling information for the UI surface. Keys are CSS selectors, values are style declarations.

surfaceUpdate.description: Updates a surface with a new set of components.

surfaceId.description: The unique identifier for the UI surface to be updated. If you are adding a new surface this *must* be a new, unique identifier that has never been used for any existing surfaces shown.

components.description: A list containing all UI component instances for the surface.

items.description: Represents a single component instance in a UI widget tree. Each instance has a unique ID and defines one component type with its properties.

id.description: The unique identifier for this component instance.

weight.description: The relative weight of this component within a flex container. This corresponds to the CSS 'flex-grow' property.

component.description: A wrapper object that MUST contain exactly one key, which is the component tag name (e.g., 'zane-button', 'zane-text', 'zane-input'). The value is an object containing the properties for that specific component.

dataModelUpdate.description: Updates the data model for a surface.

surfaceId.description: The unique identifier for the UI surface this data model update applies to.

path.description: An optional path to a location within the data model (e.g., '/user/name'). If omitted, or set to '/', the entire data model will be replaced at the root level.

contents.description: An array of data entries. Each entry must contain a 'key' and exactly one corresponding typed 'value*' property representing the value to store.

key.description: The key for this data entry.

valueString.description: A string value for this entry.

valueNumber.description: A numeric value for this entry.

valueBoolean.description: A boolean value for this entry.

valueMap.description: Represents a nested map structure as an adjacency list (array of key-value entries).

deleteSurface.description: Signals the client to delete the surface identified by 'surfaceId'.

surfaceId.description: The unique identifier for the UI surface to be deleted.
